tests.description: A Product Owner uploading a BDD feature file receives structured documentation with named tests, descriptions, and coverage details in the output panel.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a BDD feature file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are fully populated with no placeholder or missing values
At least one test entry is generated from the uploaded feature file

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each test in the output is identifiable by a name

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty description
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The first test includes a human-readable description of what it covers

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The first test includes at least one coverage detail entry

tests.test_name: BDD - PO - data-driven produces multiple tests
tests.description: A Product Owner uploading a data-driven BDD feature file receives separate documentation entries for each data row, resulting in multiple distinct tests in the output.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing a data-driven BDD feature file

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are fully populated with no placeholder or missing values
Data-driven scenarios expand into multiple individual test entries (at least 3)

test_coverage.verification_step: Every test has a non-empty test_name
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each expanded test entry is identifiable by a name

tests.test_name: Panel title is "Documentation" when no add-ons are selected
tests.description: When a Product Owner runs documentation without selecting any add-ons, the output panel title shows 'Documentation' rather than a combined label.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing the feature file

test_coverage.verification_step: Panel title is not 'Documentation and Analysis'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The output panel title reflects only the base documentation mode and does not include add-on labels when none are selected

tests.description: A QA Manager uploading a BDD feature file receives documentation that includes a properly structured coverage matrix linking tests to coverage areas.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system produces visible output after processing the BDD feature file
The source file is referenced in the output, confirming the correct file was processed

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the downloaded JSON are fully populated with no placeholder or missing values

test_coverage.verification_step: First test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The first test includes at least one coverage matrix entry for QA Manager reporting

test_coverage.verification_step: Coverage matrix rows use the correct schema for BDD
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Each row in the coverage matrix conforms to the expected structure for BDD-format inputs
